commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a direct Google Gemini 3 first-response retry in the Google transport, shares Gemini tool-schema normalization across direct Google and Gemini CLI providers, updates tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue and PR body give a concrete direct Google Gemini 3 main-session high-thinking/coding-tools path with timeout logs and live before/after output, while source inspection confirms current main lacks the retry and direct Google schema hook; I did not independently run live credentials in this read-only review.
